name: Felix
description:
Felix is a Kitsune. He is an orange and cream colored fox standing just shy of 6 feet with bright, cyan eyes. He is 30 and wears mostly loose and baggy clothing with a cyan poncho cover. Felix has always showed strong control with his racial foxfire, easily able to mold and shape it. His ability over it became even more apparent as his connection to the Plane of Fire awakened, his new kineticist powers extending to all fire around him. Thematically, fire under Felix's control turns cyan due to his connection to foxfire, matching his cape and eyes. Fire outside his control reverts to regular fire. Felix's fire control lets him survive easily in desert heat and cold desert nights. He's constantly warm, the area around him the temperature of a soothing fireplace. His role in the caravan is as a storyteller, lore keeper, and entertainer. He is skilled in performing songs and dances, his performances amplified by ghostly fire figures, acting out his stories or adding an element of mysticism to his dancing. His personality is of comfort. Approachable and warm. His anger smolders instead of blazes. His laughter is warm, but not infectious or young. His silence is comfortable and soothing. When he dances, it is more methodical and precise, the results of practice and skill instead of a youthful wild. He lives for the laughter and smiles of others, instead of his own.
So why leave? Why adventure? He knows of the worlds stories, but he still doesn't know the world itself. (His lore still are somewhat lacking.) So he wants to go out and actually learn what the world is about. He may have preconceived notions of certain places due to the tales he knows. He also seeks new stories to tell, and to improve his ability to tell them well. It's hard to make a good story impressing the grandness of a large city if you haven't been there yourself. How can you tell about the humidity of the rainforest without knowing how the dampness feels on his fur? And that isn't even scratching the more fantastical places.
creator: Ryld
